MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-07-2022 IN 206, DEFENDANT JACK LEE'S MOTION TO VACATE AND RESET TRIAL DATE. JOHN FITZPATRICK VANNUCCI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. WALTER MCMATH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/13/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 7/27/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY TRACKS THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/13/22. IF DEFENDANT NEEDS TO REOPEN DISCOVERY, IT SHOULD BE ADDRESSED IN DEPARTMENT 302, UNLESS PLAINTIFF WOULD AGREE TO STIPULATE TO AN EXTENSION. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE UNLESS THERE'S A NOTICED MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-13-2022 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JUL-27-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. (206)
